mapper.select:
SELECT c.och_code, c.ord_code, DATE_FORMAT(c.och_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS och_date, c.och_su, c.och_amnt, c.och_danw, c.och_lot, c.och_mon, c.och_dang, p.prod_name, p.prod_no, p.prod_gyu, p.prod_jai, p.tech_no, p.corp_name FROM tb_chulgo c LEFT JOIN tb_ipgo i ON i.ord_code = c.ord_code LEFT JOIN tb_product p ON p.prod_code = i.prod_code WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(c.och_date) >= #{sdate}
AND DATE(c.och_date) <= #{edate}
AND p.corp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{corp_name}, '%')
AND p.prod_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prod_name}, '%')
AND p.prod_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prod_no}, '%')
ORDER BY c.och_date DESC, c.och_code DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chulgo ( och_code, ord_code, och_date, och_su, och_amnt, och_danw, och_lot, och_mon, och_dang ) VALUES ( #{och_code}, #{ord_code}, STR_TO_DATE(#{och_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{och_su}, #{och_amnt}, #{och_danw}, #{och_lot}, #{och_mon}, #{och_dang} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(och_code) FROM tb_chulgo WHERE och_code LIKE CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d'), '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chulgo SET och_date = STR_TO_DATE(#{och_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), och_su = #{och_su}, och_amnt = #{och_amnt}, och_dang = #{och_dang}, och_mon = #{och_mon}, och_lot = #{och_lot} WHERE och_code = #{och_code}
